name: Wam Alternative Assets Limited
analysis: WMA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.9800, stop A$0.9504, target A$1.0688 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
